case_title: NEIL MACLEAN VS. FAXON GARAGE INC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-30-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-30-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF NEIL MACLEAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FAXON GARAGE INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY WALEE GON. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE AND READY TO PROCEED. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2024 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) WALEE GON FILED BY DEFENDANT FAXON GARAGE INC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $80 SERVED JUL-15-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FAXON GARAGE INC

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACLEAN, NEIL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FAXON GARAGE INC $3,207.90 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,362.90 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MACLEAN, NEIL AS TO DEFENDANT FAXON GARAGE INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-30-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
